hermes.goal: Beat buy-and-hold (positive alpha vs BTC) while keeping max drawdown under 15% and never risking the mandate on a single trade — capital preservation first. Near-term: prove a sustained, fee-aware, positive out-of-sample edge on the paper trainer over ~90 days before scaling any live capital; grow the live account only on demonstrated alpha.

brain.commentary: The council’s signals are near‑neutral with negative alphas and elevated volatilities on the long‑biased ETH and SOL. Beta >1 on those assets and a flat BTC anchor leave the portfolio exposed to market swings. LTC shows a weak, negative composite and alpha, making its signal fragile. To preserve capital we tilt the overall stance to risk‑off and modestly scale back conviction on all symbols, especially the fragile ETH, SOL, and LTC positions.
